ops.title: doc.Locate: descend into triage item visuals (pointing errors)
ops.description: Refuter finding F3 from the draft+triage Phase 1 review: `doc.Locate` (internal/doc/locate.go:61) resolves choice option visuals to `OptionVisual` but does not descend into triage item visuals, so an interaction addressing a triage item-visual block id yields a plain "unknown block" instead of a pointing error ("points to the triage block ..."). Unreachable by the three new interaction types today; affects only error quality for misaddressed interactions. Fix: mirror the choice-option-visual arm for `*doc.Triage` items.

ops.text: doc.Locate resolves a triage item-visual block id to a pointing result naming the owning triage block, mirroring the choice OptionVisual arm
a doc_test case covers the triage item-visual locate path
